data.name: Baby Blankets
data.subtitle: Made with love, for little ones
data.shortDescription: Soft, personalised baby blankets crafted from premium cotton.
data.description: Our baby blankets are handcrafted with the softest cotton fabrics, available in a range of colours and patterns. Each blanket is made to order and can be personalised with a name, date, or special message — making it a cherished keepsake for years to come.
data.customizationNote: We offer a range of fabric colours, personalisation styles, and optional matching accessories. Every blanket is made to your preferences with care and attention to detail.

data.name: Beanie Hats
data.subtitle: Cosy, custom, and made for you
data.shortDescription: Custom-knit beanies in your choice of colours and styles.
data.description: Our beanie hats are handcrafted to keep you warm while expressing your personal style. Choose your yarn colours, fit preference, and optional pom-pom or cuff detailing. Each beanie is made to order and ready to become your new favourite accessory.
data.customizationNote: We offer a variety of yarn weights, colours, and custom details. Let us know your preferences and we will create a beanie that feels truly yours.

data.name: Bucket Hats
data.subtitle: Stylish sun protection, handmade
data.shortDescription: Handcrafted bucket hats in fabrics and sizes you choose.
data.description: Our bucket hats are handmade from a carefully selected range of fabrics — from lightweight cottons to sturdy denims. Fully customisable in size, colour, and finish, they are perfect for sunny days, festival trips, or adding a playful touch to any outfit.
data.customizationNote: Choose your fabric, size, and any special details. We can also create matching sets for the whole family.

data.name: Custom Shirts
data.subtitle: Tailored to fit, designed by you
data.shortDescription: Custom-tailored shirts made from your choice of fabric and fit.
data.description: From casual button-downs to special occasion wear, our custom shirts are made to your exact measurements and style preferences. Choose your fabric, collar style, cuffs, and fit — and we will create a shirt that feels like it was made just for you. Because it was.
data.customizationNote: We take detailed measurements and guide you through fabric selection, collar styles, and fit preferences to create a shirt that is uniquely yours.

data.name: Filled Pockets
data.subtitle: Golden pastry, savoury or sweet
data.shortDescription: Handmade pastry pockets with savoury or sweet fillings.
data.description: Our filled pockets are made from scratch using a tender, golden pastry and generous fillings. Whether you prefer a savoury classic or a sweet chocolate indulgence, each pocket is baked fresh and crafted with care. Perfect for a meal on the go or a comforting treat at home.
popularIdeas: Order a savoury and sweet variety box
data.customizationNote: We can adapt fillings to suit dietary preferences and create custom combinations for events, gatherings, or everyday enjoyment.

data.name: Flat Bread
data.subtitle: Simple ingredients, exceptional taste
data.shortDescription: Soft, griddled flat bread made fresh with simple ingredients.
data.description: Our flat breads are made fresh using time-honoured techniques and the simplest ingredients — flour, water, salt, and a little patience. From the classic version to herb-infused variations, each piece is griddled to golden perfection. Enjoy them on their own, alongside a meal, or as the base for your favourite toppings.
popularIdeas: Add roasted garlic or herb butter
Order a mixed selection of flavours
data.customizationNote: We can adapt our flat bread recipes to accommodate dietary needs and create custom flavour blends for your table.

data.name: Other Bakery
data.subtitle: Seasonal treats and special requests
data.shortDescription: Seasonal bakes, custom orders, and kitchen favourites.
data.description: Beyond our regular menu, we love creating seasonal specials and custom bakes for any occasion. From celebration cakes to experimental flavour combinations, this is where your ideas come to life. Tell us what you are dreaming of, and we will bake something beautiful together.
data.customizationNote: This is our open-ended category for anything that does not fit the usual menu. Share your ideas and we will explore what is possible together.

data.name: Other Sewing
data.subtitle: Custom creations and one-off pieces
data.shortDescription: Custom sewing projects, repairs, and unique handmade pieces.
data.description: Our other sewing category covers everything from alterations and repairs to completely original creations. Have a specific project in mind? Bring us your ideas, fabrics, or inspiration and we will help bring it to life with careful stitching and thoughtful detail.
popularIdeas: Upcycling favourite fabrics into new pieces
data.customizationNote: Every custom project begins with a conversation. Share your idea, fabric, or reference and we will discuss what is possible.

data.name: Rice Packs
data.subtitle: Soothing warmth, gentle relief
data.shortDescription: Reusable rice heat packs for warmth or cooling relief.
data.description: Our reusable rice heat packs are hand-sewn and filled with natural rice, offering soothing warmth for sore muscles or gentle cooling relief when chilled. Available in a variety of fabrics and sizes, they make thoughtful, practical gifts for anyone who deserves a little comfort.
popularIdeas: Add a removable cover for easy washing
Order a set of different sizes
data.customizationNote: We offer a choice of fabrics, sizes, and optional dried lavender or herbal infusions. Each pack is made to your preferences.

data.name: Sourdough Bread
data.subtitle: Slow-fermented, deeply flavourful
data.shortDescription: Slow-fermented sourdough with a crisp crust and tender crumb.
data.description: Our sourdough is made the old-fashioned way — with a live starter, patient fermentation, and a hot oven. The result is a loaf with a deeply caramelised crust, an airy crumb, and that unmistakable tangy flavour. Choose our classic loaf or a seeded variation for added texture and nuttiness.
popularIdeas: Request a custom shape or size
data.customizationNote: We can adapt our sourdough recipes for dietary preferences and create custom shapes, sizes, or blend flavours to your liking.
